title: ぬいぐるみよりもずっと

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Oguri Cap and Tamamo Cross in front of a
store while I'm out shopping for groceries.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'd heard of these, but... seeing them for myself
really is something else.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, they're surprisingly well-made. I wonder
how much did one set ya back?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer... We're looking at these Umamusume
plushies they're selling.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
There are Tama plushies, Creek plushies... and
even ones of the president. They're all adorable.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but Oguri is the most popular. Take a look
for yourself—there's only one left in stock!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And not just in the racing scene. She's a pretty big
name in competitive eating too.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Boys, girls, grandpas, grandmas—everyone loves
Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I wanna get my hands on one of these Oguris for
myself. Unlike the real thing, you don't gotta buy
food for it!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And look at its face. It's like it knows it's a fast
runner. What do ya think, Trainer? Wanna add
this plushie to your training roster?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hey...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hah! Tempting, right?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Hold up. I just remembered I gotta meet up with
Inari.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Gotta run. See ya!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tamamo Cross dashes off.
choice_data_list: I think I'm going to buy this Oguri Cap plushie.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
What?! B-but why? You know it's just a plushie,
right?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Even you wouldn't be able to train this thing to run.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Well... I won't stop you from buying it... If you
really want one, go ahead...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: For some reason, Oguri Cap seems upset.
choice_data_list: ...On second thought, maybe I don't need it.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
How come you didn't buy the plushie? I thought
you wanted it.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
And Tama's right—you don't have to buy a
plushie food.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Wait, I pay for my own meals. That shouldn't
matter either way.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: But plushies are small. And fluffy. Not to mention cute. I can't compete there.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I just... think you're better off sticking with the real deal. I can run really fast, y'know.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
What can a plushie do? It can't even move! You'd
probably be better off believing in me over a
stuffed toy.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: No... You'd definitely be better off. I'll outdo that plushie—just you wait.
choice_data_list: Buying a plushie is a way of showing support.
Buying a plushie is a way of showing support.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: No... You'd definitely be better off. I'll outdo that plushie—just you wait.
choice_data_list: Buying a plushie is a way of showing support.
Buying a plushie is a way of showing support.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Trust me. With you by my side, I'll become the
strongest, fastest Umamusume around!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna devote all my energy to training—no
matter how hard it gets.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
After all, I'm much tougher than a plushie! So
please, keep laying it on me!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh... That makes sense. I mean, a plushie isn't
something you can train up, is it?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
A way of showing support, huh? When you put it
like that, it sounds kinda encouraging.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You, and everybody else who's bought my
plushie... You're all a source of my strength.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna keep on racing. You can always count
on me.
